title: [circt-bmc] Add ExternaliseRegisters Pass
body: This PR adds a pass (pass itself written by @maerhart, I'm just PRing as part of the splitting of #7259) that extracts `seq.compreg`s within modules, and replaces them with additional inputs and outputs such that register states are fed as module outputs, then fed back in as inputs. This simplifies model checking as the state can be provided directly as an input to a function checking the design, rather than having to walk the IR to calculate the state.
